name: The Adventures of Penny & Lou
short_description: Step into the paws of two brave shar-pei sisters on a daring mission through Stray City. This captivating 2D platformer whisks you away on an adventure with Penny and Lou as they strive to rescue their cherished toys and lend a helping paw to stray puppies in need.
detailed_description:
• Featuring 19 urban levels filled with snoochies, foxies, puppies, treats, and menchies to collect!
  • Two characters: Penny & Lou, each with their own musical theme!
  • Bonk stray cats by jumping on them!
  • Climb falling platforms!
  • Avoid traps or lose lives!

Step into the paws of two brave shar-pei sisters on a daring mission through Stray City. This captivating 2D platformer whisks you away on an adventure with Penny and Lou as they strive to rescue their cherished toys and lend a helping paw to stray puppies in need.

Set against the vibrant backdrop of bustling city streets, the Adventures of Penny & Lou challenges you to navigate through intricately designed levels, each filled with clever stray cats and devious traps. As you explore these beautifully crafted environments, the story unfolds: the mischievous Back to School Bear has banished beloved snoochies, foxies, and puppies across Stray City’s unforgiving landscape.

Harness the unique abilities of Penny and Lou to retrieve lost toys scattered throughout each level, bonk cats, and avoid traps scattered throughout each level. Their journey of teamwork and determination exemplifies the spirit of adventure and companionship, offering a charming and engaging experience filled with both challenges and heartwarming moments.

Promising players of all ages an enchanting tale of loyalty, bravery, and the unbreakable bond between sisters, dive into this delightful blend of platforming gameplay and endearing storytelling to begin your adventure!
